response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly accomplished Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of professional experience across fullstack, systems, embedded, and AI infrastructure — far exceeding the junior/mid-level scope of this role. While the technical skill overlap is strong (TypeScript, React, AWS CDK, Kubernetes), placing someone of this seniority into an entry-level individual contributor position creates severe compensation and retention mismatch risks. The candidate would almost certainly not be challenged by the work and is unlikely to remain in the role once a more appropriate opportunity arises.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matching the core tech stack requirements
Fullstack breadth covering frontend (React), backend (Node.js/TypeScript), and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes) satisfies all required and most nice-to-have qualifications
Strong engineering culture signals — TDD, clean architecture advocacy, open source authorship, and public conference talks indicate a high-quality craftsman
concerns: Massively overqualified: Staff/Senior-level with 15+ years of experience applying for a role explicitly scoped as entry-level, creating an almost certain compensation and retention mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL experience mentioned; database background skews heavily toward MongoDB with only generic SQL references and no relational depth highlighted
High on-site presence requirement is likely incompatible with the expectations and leverage of a candidate at this seniority level
